description: Implement a 'soft delete' system for the 'Track' table in the Chinook database. Add a boolean column named 'IsDeleted' to the 'Track' table, initialized to FALSE for all existing records. Mark all tracks with the Genre 'Metal' as deleted by setting IsDeleted to TRUE. Create a View named 'ActiveTracks' that shows only the tracks where IsDeleted is FALSE. Save the database changes to 'chinook.odb'.
